MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Garrett Chase Kellison appearing represented by David A. Kaufman, Esq. both via zoom.
Defendants Coconut Banana Collective and John Dempsey not appearing.

After review of the pleadings, the court finds that service of the Statement of Damages via emial is not sufficient.

Plaintiff is instructed to personaly serve both Defendants a Statement of Damages. Service must be completed at least 30 days prior to the next hearing. Proof of Service must be filed and courtesy copies delivered to department 505 at least 5 days prior to the next hearing.

This matter is continued to March 4, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Continued To Dec-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter not reported

Plaintiff Garret Chase Kellison was present represented by David Kaufman via zoom.
Defendant Coconut Banana Collective not appearing.

This matter is continued to December 24,2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505. The court did not receive any courtesty copies prior to this hearing.
